name: Oriental Rhubarb Jam
recipeIngredient: A dash of hot pepper sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the rhubarb, sugar, five spice powder, ginger, hot pepper sauce, and lemon juice.
2. Blend well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Place the mixture over low heat and stir constantly until the sugar has completely dissolved.
4. Increase the heat to medium and bring the mixture to a boil. Skim off any foam that forms on the surface.
5. Continue cooking, stirring frequently, for about 15 to 20 minutes, or until the mixture becomes transparent and thickens.
6. Remove from heat and ladle the jam into hot, sterilized jars. Seal the jars properly.
7. Makes approximately four 6-ounce jars.
